auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Benzinga API key passed as the token query parameter. Create an account and manage API access from the Benzinga API dashboard: https://www.benzinga.com/apis/

actions.name: get_consensus_ratings
actions.description: Get Benzinga consensus analyst ratings and price target data for a ticker.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol to query.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting Benzinga consensus ratings.

items.description: One raw item returned by Benzinga.

consensusRatings.description: The consensus rating records returned by Benzinga.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting Benzinga consensus ratings.

actions.name: list_analyst_ratings
actions.description: List Benzinga analyst rating calendar events with optional date and symbol filters.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol used to filter results.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to request.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Benzinga analyst rating events.

items.description: One raw item returned by Benzinga.

ratings.description: The analyst rating records returned by Benzinga.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Benzinga analyst ratings.

actions.name: list_earnings
actions.description: List Benzinga earnings calendar events with optional date and symbol filters.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol used to filter results.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to request.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Benzinga earnings calendar events.

items.description: One raw item returned by Benzinga.

earnings.description: The earnings calendar records returned by Benzinga.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Benzinga earnings events.

actions.name: list_news_channels
actions.description: List Benzinga news channels that can be used to filter news feeds.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Benzinga news channels.

items.description: One raw item returned by Benzinga.

channels.description: The news channels returned by Benzinga.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Benzinga news channels.
